description: Kata'ib Hezbollah (Brigades of the Party of God) is an Iraqi Shia paramilitary group and one of the most powerful Iranian-backed militias in Iraq. Founded by [Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis](/people/abu-mahdi-al-muhandis), it operates under the umbrella of the [Popular Mobilization Forces](/orgs/popular-mobilization-forces) and receives training, funding, and direction from the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force). The group has been designated as a Foreign Terrorist Organization by the United States since 2009. It has conducted attacks against US forces in Iraq and played a significant role in the fight against ISIS.
editorial_notes: US-designated FTO since 2009. One of the most powerful Iran-backed militias in Iraq. Affiliated with PMF.
